_comment: Reconciled 2026-06-05 (Sprint 39). S38 baseline was optimistic (62.57% stored vs comment '~75%+'); actual project-wide lines coverage 51.04% (41 360 / 76 806 statements). Sprint 39 added tests for 4 critical 0%-coverage files (llamaguard 0%→70%+, dlq 0%→75%+, contexts 0%→80%+, outbox 0%→70%+) but Sprint 39 was queued for S40 closure. Pre-Sprint-39 baseline restored at actual 51.04%; threshold 50% passed, target 75% not met. Next: Sprint 40 coverage push + property-based tests.
_achieved_threshold_note: 51.04% >= 50.0% threshold (passes), but 51.04% < 75.0% target_threshold (fails target). achieved_threshold reflects threshold pass, achieved_target reflects target fail.
pre_existing_failure_note: Confirmed pre-S38 (git stash + re-run shows same failures on master). 15 of original 17 failures were T-P1.2c regressions (providers._overrides); fixed in commit 79b1f2e9. Remaining 10 = pre-existing flaky tests + mock pollution in DSL processor tests. Tracked in S39+ backlog.

core/config/features.py.note: T1.3.0 = package skeleton (pure rename + 24-line docstring); T1.3.1+ splits deferred to S39+

next_wave_todo: T1.3.1+ features.py domain splits (9 PRs: auth, security, resilience, observability, net, workflow, ai, dsl, experimental)
actions.py split (V23 W2, 3 phases per P1_2_actions_audit.md)
S608 SQL injection fixes (30 noqa, security-critical)
BLE001 blind except fixes (180 noqa, manual refactor)
